title: Bone small stock carcase - leg
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Bone small stock carcase - leg demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Identify specifications for cuts

pcs.text: Determine specifications for cuts using cut descriptions according to regulatory requirements, customer specifications and workplace requirements.

elements.title: Bone leg

pcs.text: Slice and remove primal cuts from leg according to work instructions and specifications.2.2 Cut primal lines in compliance with regulatory requirements.2.3 Handle meat safety and quality hazards according to workplace procedures.2.4 Cut primals to maximise yield.2.5 Bone product in accordance with workplace health and safety requirements including the use of safe manual handling techniques and the safe and effective use of a knife.
